name: Unchecked Return Value to NULL Pointer Dereference
description: The product does not check for an error after calling a function that can return NULL if it fails, which leads to a subsequent NULL pointer dereference. This is a chain weakness combining unchecked return values with NULL pointer dereference.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[function_call] that can return NULL flows into TRANSFORM[dereference] without an intervening CONTROL[null_check] or CONTROL[error_check] node validating the return value
